workflow.name: Robotic Ultrasound Workflow
workflow.description: Autonomous ultrasound imaging workflow with physics-accurate ray tracing simulation for training and deploying robotic ultrasound systems

pi0_policy.description: Run PI0 policy only (single process for debugging, requires sim_env running separately)

gr00tn1_policy.description: Run GR00T N1 policy only (single process for debugging, requires sim_env running separately)

sim_env.description: Launch Isaac Sim environment with DDS communication (single process for debugging)

policy_with_sim.description: Run PI0 policy with simulation (simple pipeline without ultrasound/visualization)

run.command: bash -c '(python -m policy.run_policy --policy pi0 --ckpt_path=nvidia/Liver_Scan_Pi0_Cosmos_Rel & python -m simulation.environments.sim_with_dds --enable_cameras & wait)'

gr00tn1_with_sim.description: Run GR00T N1 policy with simulation (simple pipeline without ultrasound/visualization)

run.command: bash -c '(python -m policy.run_policy --policy gr00tn1 --ckpt_path=nvidia/Liver_Scan_Gr00t_Cosmos_Rel --chunk_length=16 & python -m simulation.environments.sim_with_dds --enable_cameras & wait)'

full_pipeline.description: Run complete pipeline with PI0 policy, simulation, ultrasound raytracing, and visualization

run.command: bash -c '(python -m policy.run_policy --policy pi0 --ckpt_path=nvidia/Liver_Scan_Pi0_Cosmos_Rel & python -m simulation.environments.sim_with_dds --enable_cameras & python -m simulation.examples.ultrasound_raytracing & python -m utils.visualization & wait)'

teleop_with_ultrasound.description: Manual teleoperation with ultrasound imaging and visualization

run.command: bash -c '(python -m simulation.examples.ultrasound_raytracing & python -m simulation.environments.teleoperation.teleop_se3_agent --enable_cameras & python -m utils.visualization & wait)'

state_machine_scan.description: Automated liver scanning using state machine

convert_hdf5.description: Convert HDF5 data to LeRobot format (requires --run-args with paths)

train_pi0.description: Train PI0 imitation learning model on collected data

train_gr00tn1.description: Train GR00T N1 foundation model on collected data

visualization.description: Launch visualization window for camera feeds and ultrasound images

clarius_cast.description: Hardware-in-the-loop with Clarius Cast ultrasound probe (requires --run-args='--config=/path/to/config.yaml')

clarius_solum.description: Hardware-in-the-loop with Clarius Solum ultrasound probe (requires --run-args='--config=/path/to/config.yaml')

realsense.description: Hardware-in-the-loop with Intel RealSense depth camera (requires --run-args='--config=/path/to/config.yaml')

run.command: bash -c '(python -m policy.run_policy --policy pi0 --ckpt_path=nvidia/Liver_Scan_Pi0_Cosmos_Rel & python -m simulation.environments.sim_with_dds --enable_cameras & python -m simulation.examples.ultrasound_raytracing & python -m utils.visualization & wait)'
